summary: Frontend testing of new profile section, animated trail dots, and 3D dashboard cards. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Login works with test@demo.com / password123
Sidebar profile section shows user's actual name 'Test User Unlocked' (data-testid='profile-name')
Sidebar profile section shows user's actual email 'test@demo.com' (data-testid='profile-email')
Sidebar profile section shows correct tier badge 'Full Access' (data-testid='profile-tier') - uppercase via CSS
Sidebar profile section shows correct level 'Level 00 · Observer' (data-testid='profile-level')
Topbar shows user's actual name 'Test User Unlocked // Level 00'
Dashboard roadmap section found (data-testid='roadmap')
Dashboard 4 act cards found (data-testid='act-card-1' through 'act-card-4')
Dashboard 3D cards render with correct colors and glowing borders
Dashboard Seeker Echo shows correct act text (data-testid='seeker-echo')
Dashboard strip found (data-testid='dash-strip')
Dashboard action strip found (data-testid='action-strip')
Dashboard hero title shows 'The Chroma Key Protocol' (data-testid='home-hero-title')
Dashboard progress bar has animated trail dots (trailPulse, trailSpark keyframes in CSS)
Dashboard floating particles visible in ambient background canvas
Act I protocol (/protocol/1) renders with Earth/Fractured Veil content
Act I header shows 'ACT I · EARTH · THE FRACTURED VEIL'
Act I 5 steps render correctly: RECOGNIZE, NAME, EXCAVATE, WITNESS, DECLARE
Act I Step 1 shows 'Ground Survey — Stability Calibration' with domain sliders
Act I Fracture Index metric with contextual reading
Act I Deepest Crack metric shows domain readings
Act I Terra agent name found
Act II protocol (/protocol/2) renders with Fire/Reclamation content
Act II header shows 'ACT II · FIRE · RECLAMATION'
Act II 5 steps render correctly: ENTER, BURN, RECLAIM, WITNESS, DECLARE
Act II Step 1 shows 'Fire Audit — Domain Calibration' with domain sliders
Act II Fire Index metric with contextual reading
Act II Hottest Domain metric shows domain readings
Act II Prometheus agent name found
critical_code_review_comments: AppShell.js correctly implements profile section with user data from AuthContext (name, email, tier, level)
AppShell.js uses ?? operator for level to handle level=0 correctly (user?.level ?? 1)
Dashboard.js correctly implements trailPulse and trailSpark animations for progress bar
Dashboard.js ActCard3D component correctly implements 3D transforms with perspective and rotateX/Y on mouse move
Dashboard.js AmbientBackground canvas renders 40 floating particles in 4 element colors
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile section in sidebar now shows actual user data (name, email, tier badge, level). Dashboard has animated trail dots on progress bar (trailPulse, trailSpark keyframes). 3D act cards have hover effects with element-colored glowing borders. Level 0 bug fixed using ?? operator. All features from iterations 6, 7, and 8 are working correctly.

notes.profile_section: Shows user name, email, tier badge (FULL ACCESS for tier=full), and level with state name
notes.animated_trail: Progress bar has trailPulse (2s ease-in-out infinite) and trailSpark (1.5s ease-in-out infinite) animations
notes.3d_cards: ActCard3D uses CSS 3D transforms (perspective 800px, rotateX/Y) on mouse move with glowing box-shadow
notes.level_fix: Uses ?? operator instead of || to handle level=0 correctly
